apiKey.description: Go to [help center](https://help.gameball.co/en/articles/3467114-get-your-account-integration-details-api-key-and-transaction-key) to learn how to find your API Key.
apiKey.label: API Key

secretKey.description: Go to [help center](https://help.gameball.co/en/articles/3467114-get-your-account-integration-details-api-key-and-transaction-key) to learn how to find your API Key.
secretKey.label: Secret Key

actions.name: Identify Player
actions.description: This Action used to create or update a player in Gameball with the provided attributes.

fields.label: Player ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

playerUniqueId.title: Player ID
playerUniqueId.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

fields.label: Join Date
fields.description: Player's join date at your system.

joinDate.title: Join Date
joinDate.description: Player's join date at your system.

fields.label: Guest
fields.description: A boolean value indicating if the customer who placed this order is a guest. The default is false.

guest.title: Guest
guest.description: A boolean value indicating if the customer who placed this order is a guest. The default is false.

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Comma separated string of tags to be attached to the player.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Comma separated string of tags to be attached to the player.

fields.label: Player Custom Attributes
fields.description: Key value pairs of any extra player attributes.

playerCustomAttributes.title: Player Custom Attributes
playerCustomAttributes.description: Key value pairs of any extra player attributes.

fields.label: Referrer Code
fields.description: Referring player’s referral code. This is used in case of referral, where the player to be created is referred by the player having this code.

referrerCode.title: Referrer Code
referrerCode.description: Referring player’s referral code. This is used in case of referral, where the player to be created is referred by the player having this code.

fields.label: Level Order
fields.description: The level order to place the player in. IMPORTANT: manual player leveling is available under special circumstances and is not available by default. Contact us for more info.

levelOrder.title: Level Order
levelOrder.description: The level order to place the player in. IMPORTANT: manual player leveling is available under special circumstances and is not available by default. Contact us for more info.

fields.label: Device Token
fields.description: The FCM token (Firebase Cloud Messaging) needed for sending mobile push notifications. (Used only in case of mobile app)

deviceToken.title: Device Token
deviceToken.description: The FCM token (Firebase Cloud Messaging) needed for sending mobile push notifications. (Used only in case of mobile app)

actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: This action allows you to track and send your players' events to Gameball.

fields.label: Event Metadata
fields.description: The event metadata to send to Gameball

metadata.title: Event Metadata
metadata.description: The event metadata to send to Gameball

fields.label: Player ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

playerUniqueId.title: Player ID
playerUniqueId.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

actions.name: Track Order
actions.description: This action used to track orders. They are designed specifically for E-Commerce Solutions.

fields.label: Player ID
fields.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

playerUniqueId.title: Player ID
playerUniqueId.description: Unique identifier for the player in your database.

fields.label: Order Id
fields.description: Unique order ID which identifies the underlying order in your system, e.g. order number, invoice number. It will be used for reversing any reward or redemption transaction on Gameball.

orderId.title: Order Id
orderId.description: Unique order ID which identifies the underlying order in your system, e.g. order number, invoice number. It will be used for reversing any reward or redemption transaction on Gameball.

fields.label: Order Date
fields.description: The date this order was placed, as an ISO8601 timestamp. Defaults to now if not provided.

orderDate.title: Order Date
orderDate.description: The date this order was placed, as an ISO8601 timestamp. Defaults to now if not provided.

fields.label: Total Price
fields.description: The sum of all order items' prices, including discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips. (Note: totalPaid is part of the totalPrice). Must be positive.

totalPrice.title: Total Price
totalPrice.description: The sum of all order items' prices, including discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips. (Note: totalPaid is part of the totalPrice). Must be positive.

fields.label: Total Paid
fields.description: The actual paid amount to the store. (Based on this amount, the player will be rewarded. Also, According to the Cashback Configuration). Must be positive.

totalPaid.title: Total Paid
totalPaid.description: The actual paid amount to the store. (Based on this amount, the player will be rewarded. Also, According to the Cashback Configuration). Must be positive.

fields.label: Total Shipping
fields.description: The total shipping price of the order. Must be positive.

totalShipping.title: Total Shipping
totalShipping.description: The total shipping price of the order. Must be positive.

fields.label: Total Tax
fields.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the order in the shop currency. Must be positive.

totalTax.title: Total Tax
totalTax.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the order in the shop currency. Must be positive.

fields.label: Total Discount
fields.description: Total discount applied on this order. Must be positive.

totalDiscount.title: Total Discount
totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on this order. Must be positive.

fields.label: Line Items
fields.description: A list of line items, each containing information about an item in the order.

lineItems.title: Line Items
lineItems.description: A list of line items, each containing information about an item in the order.

productId.title: Product Id
productId.description: The ID of the product that the line item belongs to

category.title: Category
category.description: Product category (fashion, electronics.. etc). It can be one category or multiple categories.

collection.title: Collection
collection.description: Collection ID(s) to which the product belongs. It can be one collection or multiple collections. This will be also based on the available collections in your store.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tag(s) attached to the item in the order.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: The name of the item's supplier.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Number of items purchased of this line item. Must be positive.

price.title: Price
price.description: The original price of the product before adding tax or discount. Note that: it should reflect the price of a single product ignoring quantity

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the line item in the shop currency. Must be positive. Note that: It should reflect total taxes for line item considering quantity

discount.title: Discount
discount.description: Total discount applied on this line item. Must be positive. Note that: This value should reflect total discounts for line item considering quantity

fields.label: Redeemed Amount
fields.description: Monetary value of the redeemed points to be used by that player while placing his order. Note:  If this field is set, then the holdReference value should be null. Also, both fields could be null.

redeemedAmount.title: Redeemed Amount
redeemedAmount.description: Monetary value of the redeemed points to be used by that player while placing his order. Note:  If this field is set, then the holdReference value should be null. Also, both fields could be null.

fields.label: Hold Reference
fields.description: Hold reference ID received after calling Hold Points API. This is used in case you want to use already held points. Note:  If this field is set, then the redeemedAmount value should be null. Also, both fields could be null.

holdReference.title: Hold Reference
holdReference.description: Hold reference ID received after calling Hold Points API. This is used in case you want to use already held points. Note:  If this field is set, then the redeemedAmount value should be null. Also, both fields could be null.

fields.label: Guest
fields.description: A boolean value indicating if the customer who placed this order is a guest. The default is false.

guest.title: Guest
guest.description: A boolean value indicating if the customer who placed this order is a guest. The default is false.

fields.label: Extra
fields.description: Key value pair(s) of any extra information about the order. The key values must be of type string or number

extra.title: Extra
extra.description: Key value pair(s) of any extra information about the order. The key values must be of type string or number
